description_long: This is a rectangular, beige filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a smooth surface. The cabinet stands on four black caster wheels, allowing for easy mobility across flat surfaces. The front face displays two wide drawers with a subtle vertical seam in the center, and the absence of visible handles gives it a sleek appearance. The top of the cabinet is recessed, forming a shallow open compartment that could be used for temporary storage or sorting documents. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, likely made from metal or laminated wood, suitable for urban office or administrative environments.
description: A beige, modern filing cabinet on caster wheels with two wide drawers and a recessed top compartment. Its smooth, handle-less design gives it a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wide drawers with a central seam and four caster wheels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the recessed top compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the caster wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and open top compartment.
